name: Diachronic Sample Integration: Robust Tail-Risk Estimation with Generative Models

description: arXiv:2607.10810v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deep generative models are increasingly used as simulators for downstream decision-making under data scarcity, but in risk-sensitive applications their usefulness depends on rare adverse scenarios rather than typical samples. Standard generative objectives prioritize bulk distributional fidelity, leaving low-probability tails vulnerable to local...
author: Shuning Zhao, Patrick Wong, Leran Zhang, Xiaolin Hu
